message:
🌱 Add langflow: Notify and Listen components throw error mission (#869)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "langflow-4322-notify-and-listen-components-throw-error-object-has-no-attribute-b",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "langflow: Notify and Listen components throw error: object has no attribute 'build_results' + incompatible component inputs",
+    "description": "Notify and Listen components throw error: object has no attribute 'build_results' + incompatible component inputs. Users encounter: \"Error building Component Notify:\".",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify langflow troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your langflow installation:\n```bash\npip show langflow | grep Version\nlangflow run --help 2>&1 | head -5\n```\nLook for error: `Error building Component Notify:`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review langflow configuration",
+        "description": "Notify and Listen components have Data and Text inputs that are incompatible with other nodes. This causes an `AttributeError` when building the Notify component because `build_results` was removed in a refactor but the old component code still references it."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Notify and Listen components",
+        "description": "The fix refactors the Notify and Listen components from the old format to the new format, properly handling Data input types:\n```python\ndef build_notify(self) -> Data:\n    data = None\n    if self.data:\n        if not isinstance(self.data, Data):\n            if isinstance(self.data, str):\n                data = Data(text=self.data)\n            elif isinstance(self.data, dict):\n                data = Data(data=self.data)\n            else:\n                data = Data(text=str(self.data))\n        else:\n            data = self.data\n    else:\n        data = Data(text=\"\")\n\n    if data:\n        if self.append:\n            self.append_state(self.name, data)\n        else:\n            self.update_state(self.name, data)\n    else:\n        self.status = \"No record provided.\"\n    self.status = data\n    return data\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm the issue is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest langflow to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that `Error building Component Notify:` no longer appears."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Refactored the Notify and Listen components from the old format to properly handle Data input types and remove the dependency on the removed build_results attribute.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "def build_notify(self) -> Data:\n    data = None\n    if self.data:\n        if not isinstance(self.data, Data):\n            if isinstance(self.data, str):\n                data = Data(text=self.data)\n            elif isinstance(self.data, dict):\n                data = Data(data=self.data)\n            else:\n                data = Data(text=str(self.data))\n        else:\n            data = self.data\n    else:\n        data = Data(text=\"\")\n\n    if data:\n        if self.append:\n            self.append_state(self.name, data)\n        else:\n            self.update_state(self.name, data)\n    else:\n        self.status = \"No record provided.\"\n    self.status = data\n    return data"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "langflow",
+      "community",
+      "ai-app",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "langflow"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/issues/4322",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/pull/4413"
+    },
+    "reactions": 1,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "pip",
+      "python"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). Optionally Docker for containerized deployment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:48:44.247Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
